reference: HIS VICTIM WHO HAD BEEN LOOKING ON DURING THE LITTLE SCENE AND LISTENING TO THE MYSTERIOUS VOICE IN SILENT WIDE EYED WONDER AND FEAR NOW ROSE HASTILY HIS FACE DEATHLY PALE WITH TREMBLING HANDS GATHERED UP THE MONEY HE HAD STAKED AND HURRYING INTO HIS STATE ROOM LOCKED HIMSELF IN
text: his victim who had been looking on during the little scene and listening to the mysterious voice in silent wide-eyed wonder and fear now rose hastily his face deathly pale with trembling hands gathered up the money he had staked and hurrying to his stateroom locked himself in
